symptoms: Users clicking password reset links within 5 minutes receiving 'token expired'
Token TTL shows as 0 seconds in Redis
Support volume up 3× for password reset issues
confirmed_root_cause: Token expiry calculation used datetime.utcnow() but Redis TTL was set using local server time (UTC+5:30). Net result: tokens expired 5.5 hours before they should, sometimes immediately.
resolution_action: Standardized all timestamp generation to UTC. Used int(time.time()) for Redis TTL calculation. All servers confirmed to run in UTC timezone.
